description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build and test that runs on every pull request to the main branch and on workflow dispatch. The workflow should have multiple jobs for building and testing on different platforms (Ubuntu x64 Clang, Ubuntu x64 GCC, macOS x64 Clang, macOS universal Clang, Windows x64 MSVC, Windows x64 ClangCL, and Windows arm64 ClangCL) with various steps for checking out code, building, running tests, and uploading artifacts.
